overview: The Intimate Wellness Institute of Virginia specializes in comprehensive women's pelvic health and intimate wellness care, including urogynecology, menopausal health, and aesthetic gynecology.
highlights: Robotic and minimally invasive pelvic surgery
Bioidentical hormone replacement therapy and menopausal care
Aesthetic gynecology services including vaginal rejuvenation and labiaplasty
targetAudience: Women seeking specialized care for pelvic health issues, menopausal symptoms, hormone optimization, or aesthetic gynecology.
